description: Mexican criminal organization founded in 2009 in Tepito, Mexico City, under the tutelage of Édgar Valdez Villarreal. It engages in drug trafficking, kidnapping, extortion, murder, money laundering, and other crimes. The group operates primarily in Greater Mexico City and several Mexican states, and is known for using minors in criminal activities. It remains active as of 2021.

country_links.evidence_quote: In January 2025, the organization was officially declared a terrorist organization by the United States government.
country_links.context: The United States government officially declared La Unión Tepito a terrorist organization.
